title: geodorum citrinum var. augusti
intro: Geodorum citrinum var. augusti, also known as the yellow geodorum or August's geodorum, is a type of orchid native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geodorum citrinum var. augusti include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and ground into powder or made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
